title: Neottia nankomontana
taxonomy: Neottia nankomontana is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is a type of leafless orchid, often found in the wild. Neottia nankomontana is classified as a terrestrial orchid and is closely related to the genus Cephalanthera. Further classification within the orchid family is necessary to determine its exact taxonomic position. It is often grouped within the subfamily Neottioideae.
